title: Participate in environmentally sustainable work practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Participate in environmentally sustainable work practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify current resource use

pcs.text: Identify and report workplace environmental hazards to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report workplace environmental hazards to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report workplace environmental hazards to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify resources used in own work role
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resources used in own work role?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resources used in own work role.

pcs.text: Measure and record current usage of resources using appropriate techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and record current usage of resources using appropriate techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and record current usage of resources using appropriate techniques.

pcs.text: Identify workplace environmental and resource efficiency issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace environmental and resource efficiency issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace environmental and resource efficiency issues.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can File documentation measuring current usage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can File documentation measuring current usage.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify current resource use

elements.title: Comply with environmental work practices

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Report breaches or potential breaches to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report breaches or potential breaches to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report breaches or potential breaches to supervisor.

pcs.text: Follow changes to work practices and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow changes to work practices and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow changes to work practices and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Comply with environmental work practices

elements.title: Seek opportunities to improve resource efficiency

pcs.text: Work with supervisor to identify possible areas for improvements to work practices in own work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work with supervisor to identify possible areas for improvements to work practices in own work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work with supervisor to identify possible areas for improvements to work practices in own work area.

pcs.text: Make suggestions for improvements to workplace practices in own work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make suggestions for improvements to workplace practices in own work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make suggestions for improvements to workplace practices in own work area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Seek opportunities to improve resource efficiency

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
